_description: 25 hand-picked WSD test cases for evaluating sense classification approaches. Each example has a clearly correct sense that a human would agree on.
_format: Each test: spanish text, english text, target word in spanish, list of senses (pos: translation), index of correct sense, short label

tests.spa: Tom quería saber la hora.
tests.eng: Tom wanted to know the time.
senses: verb: to know, to understand (a fact), to realize
verb: to know how to do something
verb: to find out, to learn
tests.label: saber: know (fact)

tests.spa: La comida no sabía bien.
tests.eng: The food didn't taste good.
senses: verb: to know, to understand (a fact), to realize
verb: to know how to do something
verb: to find out, to learn
tests.label: saber: taste

tests.spa: La compañía pidió al banco que le prestara dinero.
tests.eng: The company asked the bank to loan them money.
tests.label: banco: bank

tests.spa: Se sentó en el banco del parque.
tests.eng: He sat on the bench in the park.
tests.label: banco: bench

tests.spa: No tengo tiempo para esto.
tests.eng: I don't have time for this.
senses: noun: a while, period of time, long time
tests.label: tiempo: time

tests.spa: El tiempo está bonito hoy.
tests.eng: The weather is nice today.
senses: noun: a while, period of time, long time
tests.label: tiempo: weather

tests.spa: Usa el tiempo presente.
tests.eng: Use the present tense.
senses: noun: a while, period of time, long time
tests.label: tiempo: tense

tests.spa: Supe que me había quebrado la muñeca izquierda.
tests.eng: I knew I'd broken my wrist.
tests.label: muñeca: wrist

tests.spa: Mamá compró una bonita muñeca para ella.
tests.eng: Mother bought a beautiful doll for her.
tests.label: muñeca: doll

tests.spa: Tom cree que el rico merece ser rico.
tests.eng: Tom believes that the rich deserve to be rich.
tests.label: rico: rich

tests.spa: Esa planta necesita sombra.
tests.eng: That plant needs shade.
tests.label: planta: plant

tests.spa: Viven en la planta doce de este bloque.
tests.eng: They live on the 12th floor of this condo.
tests.label: planta: floor

tests.spa: Un conejo tiene las orejas largas y la cola corta.
tests.eng: A rabbit has long ears and a short tail.
tests.label: cola: tail

tests.spa: Elige una carta, cualquier carta.
tests.eng: Pick a card, any card.
tests.label: carta: card

tests.spa: Esto ocurrió antes de recibir tu carta.
tests.eng: This happened prior to receiving your letter.
tests.label: carta: letter

tests.spa: Escribe en una hoja de papel tus objetivos.
tests.eng: Write down your goals on a piece of paper.
tests.label: hoja: sheet

tests.spa: Su partido sacó la mayoría de los votos.
tests.eng: Their party won the most votes in the election.
tests.label: partido: party

tests.spa: Perdimos el partido de fútbol por una gran diferencia.
tests.eng: We lost the soccer game by a lot.
tests.label: partido: game

tests.spa: Me gustaría tomar al menos una botella más de cerveza.
tests.eng: I'd like to drink at least one more bottle of beer.
tests.label: tomar: drink

tests.spa: No debería volver a pasar.
tests.eng: It shouldn't happen again.
senses: verb: to pass, to hand, to slip
verb: to pass, to get past, to go past
tests.label: pasar: happen

tests.spa: Voy a pasar el fin de semana en Tokio.
tests.eng: I am going to spend the weekend in Tokyo.
senses: verb: to pass, to hand, to slip
verb: to pass, to get past, to go past
tests.label: pasar: spend time

tests.spa: Tienes el derecho a la libertad de expresión.
tests.eng: You have the right to free speech.
tests.label: derecho: right (noun)

tests.spa: No puedo correr porque estoy muy cansado.
tests.eng: I can't run because I'm very tired.
senses: verb: to throw out; to fire
tests.label: correr: run

tests.spa: Tom intentó meter a la fuerza la clavija en el agujero.
tests.eng: Tom tried to force the peg into the hole.
senses: verb: to cram, to stuff, to stick
tests.label: meter: insert

tests.spa: Me podría meter en problemas si hiciera aquello.
tests.eng: I could get in trouble if I did that.
senses: verb: to cram, to stuff, to stick
tests.label: meter: get into (trouble)
